args.query: SELECT Id, OwnerId, EffectiveDate FROM "Order" WHERE EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25'

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, OwnerId, EffectiveDate FROM "Order" WHERE EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25'

args.query: SELECT REPLACE(T1.OwnerId, '#', '') as AgentId, SUM(T2.Quantity * T2.UnitPrice) as TotalSales FROM "Order" T1 JOIN OrderItem T2 ON REPLACE(T1.Id, '#', '') = REPLACE(T2.OrderId, '#', '') WHERE T1.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND T1.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25' GROUP BY AgentId ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 1

exec_args.sql: SELECT REPLACE(T1.OwnerId, '#', '') as AgentId, SUM(T2.Quantity * T2.UnitPrice) as TotalSales FROM "Order" T1 JOIN OrderItem T2 ON REPLACE(T1.Id, '#', '') = REPLACE(T2.OrderId, '#', '') WHERE T1.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND T1.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25' GROUP BY AgentId ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 1
